title: kbs console get view prints currently active view mode
description:
Given the console server is running
And the view mode has been set (e.g., via kbs console view epics)

When I run kbs console get view

Then the command prints the current view mode (e.g., 'epics')

Given the server is running but view mode has never been explicitly set

When I run kbs console get view

Then the command prints 'none' (server has no opinion; browser uses its own default)

Given the console server is not running

When I run kbs console get view

Then the command prints 'Console server is not running.' and exits 0

Acceptance criteria:
- Valid output values: 'initiatives', 'epics', 'issues', or 'none'
- No error exit code when server is offline
creator: ryan.porter
